posts.author: TomBooth (Tom Booth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi i am looking to find a way of possibly using to link two boards
Board 1 is used to place and track orders.
Board 2 is a manufacturing and production flow tracking board.

the sinoreoin i am trying to create when status changes in board 1 to delivered, I would like to create this item in board 2, example item (apple )number of ordered apples (20 )
In board 2 i would like to have 20 items created called apples

thank you in advance for any help

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TomBooth

Welcome to the Community!

There isn’t an existing automation to create the 20 items from one trigger as described.
To achieve this, I would find a way to trigger the automation the correct number of times to generate the number of items you’re looking for.

Is there a specific reason to create 20 individual items and not a single item with a quantity column? Maybe we can find an optimal set up for your desired end result.

Let me know if you wanted to chat
